title: BioNLP 2011 - Gene Regulation Event Extraction
description: Biomedical event extraction for gene regulation, based on the BioNLP 2011 Shared Task (Kim et al., ACL Workshop 2011). Annotators identify biological entities and mark regulatory events such as gene expression, transcription, and protein catabolism in scientific abstracts.
citation:

    booktitle = "Proceedings of BioNLP Shared Task 2011 Workshop",
    month = jun,
    year = "2011",
    address = "Portland, Oregon, USA",
    publisher = "Association for Computational Linguistics",
    url = "https://aclanthology.org/W11-1801",
    pages = "1--6"
}
